title: helichrysum dasymallum
intro: Helichrysum dasymallum, also known as the bushy everlast or yellow everlast, is a shrubby perennial plant species in the daisy family native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, terpenes, and sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Helichrysum dasymallum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties, making it a popular choice in natural remedies for various health concerns. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum dasymallum include essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
